data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Trade Sideways On US-Iran Meeting Delay
data.description: Bitcoin is currently valued at $75,616.60, maintaining stability above $75,000 amid impending U.S.-Iran talks. Other cryptocurrencies include Ethereum at $2,307.95, Solana at $85.35, XRP at $1.42, Dogecoin at $0.09440, and Shiba Inu at $0.056023. Coinglass data reports liquidation of 114,658 traders in the last 24 hours, totaling $286.09 million losses. SoSoValue data shows $238.4 million inflows from spot Bitcoin ETFs on Monday, with Ethereum ETFs seeing $67.8 million inflows. Top gainers in the past day are RaveDAO, MemeCore, and JUST. Deutsche Bank notes a resurgence in U.S. crypto adoption, speculating on Bitcoin's potential rise to $120,000.

data.title: Liberty Service Partners Expands into the Mid-Atlantic with Partnership with HVAC & Plumbing Unlimited
data.description: In Dallas on April 21, 2026, Liberty Service Partners, a prominent company offering residential home services, revealed its collaboration with HVAC & Plumbing Unlimited, a respected provider of HVAC and plumbing services that has been operating in Northern Virginia since 2006. This partnership aims to enhance services for customers in the region and leverage the combined experience and expertise of the two companies. The team at HVAC & Plumbing Unlimited will bring their 20 years of experience to work with Liberty Service Partners to ensure high-quality services.

data.title: Tether's USDT market cap reaches record high, surpassing USDC amid DeFi users seeking stability post recent hacks.
data.description: The market capitalization of USDT, a stablecoin offered by Tether, has reached a record high. This surge in market cap suggests that users within the decentralized finance sector are showing a preference for USDT over USDC, another stablecoin. This move seems to be driven by a desire to seek shelter from the recent challenges faced by the industry.
